description: Six templates landed this session (privacy-disclosure-release, human-feedback-questionnaire, ai-feedback-questionnaire, architecture-review-receipt, code-review-receipt, release-operations-item). Outstanding templates worth authoring next: baseline-capability-receipt.template.json (mostly Koma-output but humans need a starter), secret-labs-receipt.template.json, ai-feedback-response.template.json (AI fills this against an AI questionnaire), human-feedback-response.template.json, release-operations-catalog.template.json (the wrapper around N items). Each template gets a JSON file + a decode test that loads it via #filePath path math, substitutes placeholders, and decodes against the schema (schema drift fails the test). Same pattern as the 6 already shipped.
title: Complete the remaining 4-5 schema templates across privacy/baseline/feedback families
